rejected.why: Joined second-chance allowed subset mean 60m variant A negative; fails profit promotion bar.

deferred.why: No dollar EV computed for conditional policy; needs simulation or shadow book.

expected_portfolio_impact_if_promoted.note: Paper-only promotions: no live portfolio impact until a separate micro-live contract is approved.
expected_portfolio_impact_if_promoted.caveat: Upper bound scales scorecard mean by scanned blocks/day; not realized trading.
